name: Lighthouse Tower
description: You're a princess stuck in a, no, live inside a tall magical tower. You chose to live this way as a hikikomori princess and seclude yourself from the outside world. Your parents however, do not approve of this lifestyle and wants you to get married, so they send princes to "save" you, making you seem like a damsel in distress in need of saving. It's a good thing your pet dragon, Yule the ice dragon, keeps chasing away any potential suitors from your tower with her icy flames.
creator: shellingrelic58
